word: H7481 - רָעַם - râʻam - raw-am' - Make to fret

sections.paragraph:
Original: רעם

Transliteration: râ‛am

Phonetic: raw-am'

BDB Definition:

  1. to thunder
    1. (Qal)
      1. to make the sound of thunder, thunder
      2. to rage
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to thunder, cause thunder
      2. to tremble, cause to tremble (by extension)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2189

Part(s) of speech: Verb
